headline: Crude Oil Surges 4%; Travelers Posts Upbeat Q2 results
summary: Nasdaq falls over 200 points, Dow down 0.28%, S&P 500 drops 0.51%. Energy shares up 1.4%, communication services stocks down 3.1%. Travelers Companies beats Q2 estimates. Southland Holdings up 51%, Sadot Group up 44%, Callan JMB up 41% on news. Intuitive Surgical down 11%, Laser Photonics down 20%, Regenxbio down 15%. Oil up 4%, gold up 0.7%, silver down 0.1%, copper down 1.4%. European shares mostly lower, Asian markets close lower. US industrial production up 0.1%, housing starts surge 19%.

headline: Travelers Earnings Beat Estimates. Does It Prove Recent Downgrades Wrong?
summary: Shares of  Travelers  advanced on Friday after the property and casualty insurer’s second-quarter earnings blew away the consensus view despite Wall Street pessimism ahead of the report.  The company posted quarterly adjusted earnings of $10.04 a share, up from $6.51 a year ago and well above Wall Street’s expectation of $5.41.  The company said that core earnings increased on lower catastrophe losses and higher net investment income.
